---
name: 功能建议 / Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: '[Feature]: '
labels: enhancement
---

## 需求描述 / Description

请清晰简洁地描述您希望添加的功能。
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## 使用场景 / Use Case

描述该功能在什么场景下使用，以及为什么它对您有帮助。
Describe the scenario where this feature would be used and why it would help you.

## 建议方案 / Proposed Solution

如果您有具体的实现思路或方案，请在这里描述。
If you have a specific implementation idea or approach, please describe it here.

## 替代方案 / Alternatives (Optional)

您是否考虑过其他替代方案？
Have you considered any alternative solutions or workarounds?

## 补充说明 / Additional Context (Optional)

Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
请在此处添加其他相关上下文内容或截图。
